description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent red sloped roof extending over a covered porch and carport area. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, complemented by green window frames and a wooden accent on the porch. The front facade includes a small set of steps leading up to the porch, and the property is surrounded by a neatly maintained green lawn. A short driveway leads to the carport, and a low fence with decorative panels marks the boundary at the front. The windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, with several narrow windows on the side and larger ones facing the front. The overall design is modern and practical, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a red sloped roof, covered porch, and carport, set on a green lawn with a decorative front fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, carport, and decorative fence panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended sloped roof, carport, and driveway leading to the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with minimal windows and the expanse of the green lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a row of narrow windows and the continuation of the sloped roof.
